name: Unauthorized MQTT Access
description: Detects connections to MQTT brokers from unauthorized sources or suspicious publish/subscribe patterns
query:
// MQTT Unauthorized Access (NDR)
// Suspicious MQTT activity on sensitive topics
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "mqtt"
  and (topic contains "admin" or topic contains "config"
    or (message_type = "publish" and topic contains "/command/"))
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
